calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Melvin Hodges appearing with and for petitioner. Counsel will submit the order tomorrow. The petitioner said the decedent is not survived by a domestic partner. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
